ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "code" TEXT /* ISO code of the country (e.g., af, al, ag) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "area" REAL /* Total area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "area_land" REAL /* Land area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "area_water" REAL /* Water area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Capital of the country */,
  "region" TEXT /* Regional classification of the country */,
  "sub_region" TEXT /* Sub-regional classification of the country */,
  "population_year" INTEGER /* Year used for population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_alt_names" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alternative name */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the alternative name belongs to */,
  "alt_name" TEXT /* Alternative name of the country */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the demographic data belongs to */,
  "population" REAL /* Population of the country */,
  "population_growth" REAL /* Population growth rate of the country */,
  "birth_rate" REAL /* Birth rate of the country */,
  "death_rate" REAL /* Death rate of the country */,
  "migration_rate" REAL /* Migration rate of the country */,
  "urban_population" REAL /* Urban population of the country */,
  "rural_population" REAL /* Rural population of the country */,
  "population_year" INTEGER /* Year used for population data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economy" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the economic data belongs to */,
  "gdp" REAL /* GDP of the country */,
  "gdp_per_capita" REAL /* GDP per capita of the country */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate of the country */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the country */,
  "gdp_growth_rate" REAL /* GDP growth rate of the country */,
  "gdp_year" INTEGER /* Year used for GDP data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the education data belongs to */,
  "literacy_rate" REAL /* Literacy rate of the country */,
  "primary_education" REAL /* Primary education rate of the country */,
  "secondary_education" REAL /* Secondary education rate of the country */,
  "tertiary_education" REAL /* Tertiary education rate of the country */,
  "education_year" INTEGER /* Year used for education data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_education_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "health" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each health record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the health data belongs to */,
  "life_expectancy" REAL /* Life expectancy of the country */,
  "infant_mortality" REAL /* Infant mortality rate of the country */,
  "healthcare_coverage" REAL /* Healthcare coverage rate of the country */,
  "health_expenditure" REAL /* Health expenditure of the country */,
  "health_year" INTEGER /* Year used for health data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_health_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each energy record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the energy data belongs to */,
  "energy_production" REAL /* Energy production of the country */,
  "energy_consumption" REAL /* Energy consumption of the country */,
  "renewable_energy" REAL /* Renewable energy production of the country */,
  "energy_year" INTEGER /* Year used for energy data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environment" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environment record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the environment data belongs to */,
  "co2_emissions" REAL /* CO2 emissions of the country */,
  "water_pollution" REAL /* Water pollution rate of the country */,
  "deforestation" REAL /* Deforestation rate of the country */,
  "environment_year" INTEGER /* Year used for environment data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environment_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, researcher, analyst) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the data */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_admin" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country administrator */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the administrator belongs to */,
  "admin_id" INTEGER /* ID of the administrator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_admin_admin_id FOREIGN KEY ("admin_id") REFERENCES users ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_admin_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "country_data_updates" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data update */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was updated */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_country_data_updates_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data provided by the source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sources_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_imports" (
  "id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each import record */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* ID of the country the data belongs to */,
  "import_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was imported */,
  "import_description" TEXT /* Description of the import */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_imports_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("id")
)
